recent_messages.content:
Command: /hivefiver research

Task:
Run read-only checkpoint now and pick the safest next non-overlapping TDD slice.

Mandatory:
- Review at least 2 pending/in_progress tasks from `.hivemind/state/tasks.json` and hierarchy cursor context.
- Provide GO/NO-GO gate for next implementation slice.

Return format:
1) EVIDENCE (>=5 citations path:line)
2) PENDING_TASK_REVIEW (>=2 items)
3) NEXT_TDD_SLICE (objective, red tests, expected files)
4) GATE_DECISION (GO/NO-GO + exact conditions)

No file edits.
